word.definition: A gamut is a range or series of related things. When we say that something “runs the gamut,” we are saying that it encompasses an entire range of related things.

sports_fact.text: Bobby Orr is the only defenseman ever to lead the NHL in scoring — and he did it twice.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: SpaceX Overtakes Amazon in Market Value
market.summary: U.S. stocks mixed, oil dips below $80 a barrel as investors seek further clarity on Iran deal

quote.text: There are some people so stupid you have to show them everything. I didn't realize that there are people so stupid you can't show them anything.
quote.author: Murray Leinster

history.text: The first purpose-built roller coaster, LaMarcus Adna Thompson's "Switchback Railway", opens in New York's Coney Island amusement park.
